key_metrics_output: Polymer type identification; plastic composition determination
abstract: ISO 6775:2024 specifies procedures using Raman spectroscopic methods for qualitative analysis and identification of plastic materials in their original form, including general plastics and multi-layer film plastics composition analysis.

key_metrics_output: determine the composition of unknown general plastics and multi-layer film plastics
abstract: applicable to the qualitative analysis of plastic materials in their original form by Raman spectroscopy
describes procedures to determine the composition of unknown general plastics and multi-layer film plastics
